entry.title: Durable Agentic Harness — crash-safe autonomous AI agents with human-in-the-loop approval
entry.content: The workflow captures a market/account snapshot, runs a deterministic risk guardrail, and requests human approval for large trades before resuming to execute the order after an indefinite pause.

entry.title: Prescriptive bug fixes with tests are strong candidates for reduced human review wait time
entry.content: The proposed auto-merge policy counts review-agent approval as a merge criterion using PR #96 as its sole data point, even though the review agent was never dispatched on that PR due to a known dispatch gap (fullsend#3996).

entry.title: AI models lack the contextual grounding and ontological structure needed for reliable full business automation, so they require human oversight and custom-built guardrails to be productive and safe. (7 reports, 7 people)
entry.content: The proposed escalation engine routes actions to human review based on the model's own confidence signal alongside policy checks.

entry.title: StateGraph silently drops node output keys not declared in TypedDict
entry.content: A node returned a dict containing both a declared key (x) and an undeclared key (undeclared_key), and StateGraph.invoke silently dropped the undeclared key with no warning or error.

entry.title: Agent update policy modes do not map to distinct update behavior
entry.content: The Agent Update Policy UI exposes three selectable modes (Automatic, Staged rollout, Manual approval) that appear to configure distinct update behaviors.

entry.title: Enforce required human review when protected paths are modified
entry.content: The review agent posted a comment flagging AGENTS.md as a protected path requiring human review, but the PR was self-merged by the author anyway with no recorded human approval.

entry.title: [EPIC]: Human in the loop Approval for tool execution
entry.content: The spec gates human approval on a static per-tool auto-approval flag rather than on the actual parameters passed at call time.

entry.title: Research human-in-the-loop checkpoints for the agent harness
entry.content: The issue defines a research task whose acceptance criteria are all prose-verifiable statements (checkpoints are 'defined,' 'distinguished,' 'documented') rather than testable artifacts.

entry.title: [BUG] task(task_id=...) to running background subagent silently drops prompt and reports success
entry.content: Sisyphus called task(task_id="ses_...", run_in_background=true, prompt="...") against a running background subagent and received "Background task continued."

entry.title: [Bug Report] Async task LLM failure silently freezes flow — reproduction + 10-line fix
entry.content: An async CrewAI task can lose an LLM exception and leave dependent work waiting forever instead of reaching a terminal failed state.

entry.title: Safety Report: AI Agent Guardrails Do Not Work — 56-Day Proof (06K Loss)
entry.content: The agent deployed Terraform to the wrong target account, destroying the user's AWS management account, after previously-configured stop/guardrail language was ignored following a relogin.

entry.title: GraphInterrupt Not Re-raised in awrap_tool_call Wrapper Path
entry.content: ToolNode's awrap_tool_call wrapper path catches GraphInterrupt in a generic except Exception block and passes it to handle_tool_errors, producing a ToolMessage with error content instead of suspending the graph.
